rag_rules: Fix type mismatches in AGREE expressions by ensuring left and right sides of '=' and '/' operations match in type, using int, real, or bool as appropriate
Resolve '<error>' types by tracing unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations on the same line and correcting or removing the clause
generic_rules: In AGREE contracts, ensure all identifiers are visible in the current scope and properly typed
Use only declared constants, equations, or visible component features in guarantee and assumption expressions
When assigning values in implementation scopes, target existing output features or declared auxiliary variables
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE expressions must have consistent types across operators like '=' and '/'
AGREE scalar types are int, real, and bool; avoid package-qualified or invalid type names
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the AADL model
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for output dependency contracts
irrelevant_topics: Component type annexes vs implementation annexes
Assumption and guarantee placement in component types
